title: hypericum capitatum var. capitatum
intro: Hypericum capitatum var. capitatum, also known as the narrow-leaf St. John's Wort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Hypericum genus. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hypericum capitatum var. capitatum include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and provide relief from pain and skin irritations. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes, and its dried flowers and leaves can also be used in topical creams and ointments.
